headline: McCormick’s Unilever Deal And Mexico Stake Shift Growth And Valuation Story
summary: McCormick (NYSE:MKC) has entered into a large food sector transaction with Unilever, reshaping its portfolio exposure. The company has also increased its ownership in McCormick de Mexico, deepening its presence in Latin American markets. These moves highlight McCormick's current focus on acquisitions and regional expansion within its core categories. For investors tracking NYSE:MKC, these deals come at a time when the stock has faced sustained pressure, with shares around $47.90 and a 28.8%...
